---
title: "Gbocho Alexandre"
---

# Applied Mathematician

**Berlin, Germany**

I am specialized in the applications of Mathematical Optimization in industry, more precisely signal processing and signal for system identifications.
My interests lies in Process engineering, biofuels, biogazs and robotics; 

[👉 View all repositories](https://github.com/AlexN7-Shepard?tab=repositories)
